source_pr.title: *: add tests/globalkilltest/go.sum file into git to remove noise
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: crazycs <chen.two.cs@gmail.com>

<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

After I run `make test`, a new file `tests/globalkilltest/go.sum` will appear. This PR just add this file into git.

```shell
▶ git status
On branch master
Your branch is up to date with 'origin/master'.

Untracked files:
  (use "git add <file>..." to include in what will be committed)

        tests/globalkilltest/go.sum

nothing added to commit but untracked files present (use "git add" to track)

```

### What is changed and how it works?

N/A

### Related changes

- N/A

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- No code

Side effects

- N/A

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- N/A
